workflow_name: View Table Spaces by Name Filter, Display Status, and Navigate to Tables via DB2 System Catalog TESTING

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option S to select Table Spaces on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type a table space name or name pattern in the Schema filter field to narrow the Table Spaces list
Press Enter to submit the filter and display the matching Table Spaces list
Type line command DIS in the Select field next to the target table space to display its status
Press Enter to display the DB2 command output showing the table space status
Press PF3 to return to the Table Spaces list
Type line command D in the Select field next to the target table space to navigate to its parent database
Press Enter to navigate to the Databases list for the selected table space
Type line command T in the Select field next to the target database to view its tables
Press Enter to navigate to the Tables, Views, and Aliases list for the selected database
